description: Discussion on how investors can add value beyond just capital, featuring insights from Shane, Ian, and Jasmine on democratizing investment and the evolving role of investors.
topic_summary: The panel explores the transformation in investing, emphasizing the importance of adding value and differentiating oneself in a competitive landscape. Key topics include the democratization of investing, the role of cryptocurrency exchanges, and the focus on finance, metaverse, and DAO infrastructure in investment strategies.
